cards.back: A subset of Machine Learning that uses multiple layers to analyze data and make predictions or decisions.
A type of Machine Learning that uses simple algorithms and only one layer to analyze data.
A type of Machine Learning that uses multiple layers of complex algorithms to analyze data and make predictions or decisions.
Deep Learning is used to solve complex problems and tasks such as image and speech recognition, natural language processing, and game playing.

Deep learning works by using a series of layers to analyze data, including input layers, hidden layers, and output layers. The layers are trained using large amounts of data to make predictions or decisions.
Common challenges in deep learning include data quality and quantity, overfitting, and model interpretability.
